SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.imap

Class ImapClient

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.imap.ImapClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class ImapClient extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Lightweight IMAP helper used by tests and utilities to fetch messages from a mailbox.

This class is intentionally small and focused: it connects to an IMAP server using Jakarta Mail, opens a folder (defaults to INBOX), and exposes convenience methods to fetch all messages or search for a message by its Message-ID header.

Usage example: 

 try (ImapClient client = new ImapClient("imap.example.com", 993, "user", "pass")) {
     List<Message> messages = client.fetchEmails();
     Message m = client.fetchEmailByMessageId("<abc@example.com>");

     // Delete the message after verification
     client.deleteMessage(m);

     // Or purge all messages in the folder
     int deleted = client.purgeFolder();
 }

Notes: - Port 993 will enable SSL for Jakarta Mail by default. - The client implements AutoCloseable so it can be used in try-with-resources blocks.

  • Constructor Details

    • ImapClient

      public ImapClient(String host, long port, String username, String password)

    • ImapClient

  • Method Details

    • buildProperties

      private Properties buildProperties()
      Builds Jakarta Mail session properties for IMAP/IMAPS.

    • fetchEmails

      public List<jakarta.mail.Message> fetchEmails()
      Fetches all emails from the configured folder.

      On error the method logs the exception and returns an empty list.

      Returns:
      List of Messages (possibly empty). Never returns null.

    • searchByMessageId

      public jakarta.mail.Message searchByMessageId(String messageId)
      Searches for an email by Message-ID using IMAP SEARCH command.

      This is more efficient than fetching all messages for large mailboxes. The search is performed server-side using the HEADER search key.

      Parameters:
      messageId - The Message-ID to search for.
      Returns:
      The Message if found, otherwise null.

    • fetchEmailByMessageId

      public jakarta.mail.Message fetchEmailByMessageId(String messageId)
      Fetches an email by its Message-ID header.

      First attempts to use IMAP SEARCH for efficiency. If SEARCH fails or returns no results, falls back to a linear scan over all messages.

      Parameters:
      messageId - The Message-ID to search for (for example: "<abc@example.com>").
      Returns:
      The Message if found, otherwise null.

    • deleteMessage

      public boolean deleteMessage(jakarta.mail.Message message)
      Deletes a single message from the mailbox.

      The folder is reopened in READ_WRITE mode if necessary. The message is marked as deleted and then expunged from the server.

      Parameters:
      message - The message to delete.
      Returns:
      true if deletion was successful, false otherwise.

    • purgeFolder

      public int purgeFolder()
      Purges all messages from the configured folder.

      All messages in the folder are marked as deleted and then expunged. The folder is opened in READ_WRITE mode for this operation.

      Returns:
      The number of messages deleted, or -1 on error.

    • extractMimeParts

      public List<MimePart> extractMimeParts(jakarta.mail.Message message)
      Extracts all MIME parts from a message using the built-in EmailParser.

      Writes the message to a byte stream and parses it using the project's EmailParser, which handles multipart structures and content decoding.

      Parameters:
      message - The message to extract parts from.
      Returns:
      List of MimePart objects, or empty list on error.

    • extractParts

      public List<ImapClient.PartDescriptor> extractParts(jakarta.mail.Message message)
      Extracts parts from a message and converts them to PartDescriptor records.

      This is a convenience method that returns parts as simple records with headers as a Map, body as a String, and content hashes for assertion matching.

      Parameters:
      message - The message to extract parts from.
      Returns:
      List of PartDescriptor objects, or empty list on error.

    • close

      public void close() throws Exception
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Throws:
      Exception
